title: ‘Then lots of bombs start going off’: Trump on what will happen when Iran ceasefire expires
summary_full: US President Trump has warned of a significant escalation in the Iran conflict, stating "lots of bombs start going off" if a peace deal isn't reached before the current ceasefire expires.  While a US delegation prepares for talks, Iran's participation remains uncertain, with Tehran resisting negotiations under pressure.  Washington's core demand is Iran's renunciation of nuclear weapons.
